overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city street. The scene features prominent neon signage, holographic advertisements, wet reflective surfaces, and light traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk with neon advertisements and reflective surfaces

events.description: pedestrian with red hair walks past the camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk, observing the neon-lit street and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: person with red hair and dark jacket walking toward camera and passing by

entered.detail: tall curved digital display showing 'BIG' text with colorful glitch effects
tree with pink and white illuminated blossoms
tall modern street light illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk in a futuristic city at night. A massive digital billboard displaying 'BIG' dominates the right side, while a neon-illuminated cherry tree glows nearby. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights, and a pedestrian with red hair passes by closely on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath building overhang with glowing support pillars

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath building overhang, sheltering from rain
passing color-changing pillars shifting from pink to cyan blue illumination

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overhang past the glowing pillars, moving toward the distant intersection

entered.detail: structural columns with shifting neon lighting cycling through pink and blue
extended roof structure providing shelter over the sidewalk
distant elevated roadway or monorail track silhouetted against the fog

segments.scene_description: Moving under a building overhang into a semi-covered walkway. The environment shifts from open rain to sheltered space with color-changing neon pillars on the right. The BIG billboard recedes into the distance while an elevated highway structure becomes visible ahead through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with elevated highway and multiple digital billboards

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection area with wider street crossing
waiting at crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the major intersection, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: multiple large holographic advertisements including 'New Job? Get an Upgrade' text
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
red street sign reading 'Longshore St' mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection. The camera approaches a crosswalk marked with yellow stripes while futuristic vehicles pass by. Multiple large digital billboards advertise various products, and a red 'Longshore St' sign becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with towering skyscrapers and neon signage

events.description: turning head to survey the intersection while continuing to cross the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and observing the surrounding neon advertisements and architecture

notable_agents.action: purple sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the intersection while looking around at the surrounding architecture. The elevated highway structure recedes into the distance as the camera moves forward. Various neon storefronts and digital billboards line the streets, with a purple sedan passing by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked sidewalk into a wide, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins by moving past a glowing cherry tree and a massive digital billboard displaying the word BIG, with the wet pavement reflecting vibrant lights as a red-haired pedestrian passes by. As the camera moves under a building overhang, the open rain gives way to a sheltered walkway lined with color-changing neon pillars while an elevated highway emerges through the distant fog. The scene then opens into a broad intersection, crossing yellow-striped pavement amidst passing futuristic vehicles and a red Longshore St sign. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the heart of the city, passing a purple sedan and various neon storefronts as the highway structure recedes into the distance.
